name: Santosh Sangnod
title: Founder & CEO · Full Stack Developer
tagline: Building the future of rural food delivery, one commit at a time.
bio: I'm a solo founder and full-stack developer from Kolhapur, Maharashtra. I built FeedoZone — a hyperlocal food delivery platform solving real problems in rural and semi-urban India. I handle everything: product strategy, development, operations, and growth.
shortBio: Founder of FeedoZone · Full Stack Developer · B.Tech CSBS @ TKIET
college: Tatyasaheb Kore Institute of Engineering & Technology (TKIET), Warananagar
